'''zanuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cedant|cedant]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cedant|cedant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zanuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zænizith|zænizith]] || [[word:zænizij|zænizij]] || [[word:zænizish|zænizish]] || [[word:zænizi|zænizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zanunuzuth|zanunuzuth]] || [[word:zanunuzuj|zanunuzuj]] || [[word:zanunuzush|zanunuzush]] || [[word:zanunuzu|zanunuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zanuzuth|zanuzuth]] || [[word:zanuzuj|zanuzuj]] || [[word:zanuzush|zanuzush]] || [[word:zanuzu|zanuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zanufzuth|zanufzuth]] || [[word:zanufzuj|zanufzuj]] || [[word:zanufzush|zanufzush]] || [[word:zanufzuf|zanufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zanuzuthu|zanuzuthu]] || [[word:zanuzuju|zanuzuju]] || [[word:zanuzushu|zanuzushu]] || [[word:zanuzuku|zanuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zanuzuth|zanuzuth]] || [[word:zanuzuj|zanuzuj]] || [[word:zanuzush|zanuzush]] || [[word:zanuzu|zanuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zanuzuthul|zanuzuthul]] || [[word:zanuzujul|zanuzujul]] || [[word:zanuzushul|zanuzushul]] || [[word:zanuzukul|zanuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zanuzuthuthu|zanuzuthuthu]] || [[word:zanuzujuju|zanuzujuju]] || [[word:zanuzushushu|zanuzushushu]] || [[word:zanuzuku|zanuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zanuzuthun|zanuzuthun]] || [[word:zanuzujun|zanuzujun]] || [[word:zanuzushun|zanuzushun]] || [[word:zanuzukun|zanuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zanuzuthuoro|zanuzuthuoro]] || [[word:zanuzujuoro|zanuzujuoro]] || [[word:zanuzushuoro|zanuzushuoro]] || [[word:zanuzukuoro|zanuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
